Employee Guide — How to Create, Send & Track Quotes
PART 1 — CREATING A NEW QUOTE
1
Fill out the form with the client's info, venue, date, tables, upgrades, and services.
2
Click ⚡ Generate Quote at the bottom. This builds the quote table and the email that will be sent.
3
Click 💾 Save Quote File. This does two things automatically:
✅ It logs the quote into the Quote Tracker automatically — no extra step needed.
✅ It downloads a backup file (ends in .ipsquote) to your Downloads folder.
⚠️ Always click Save Quote File — even if you're not ready to send yet. This is the step that gets the quote into the Tracker.
4
Click ☁️ Open Drive Folder. This opens our 2026 Google Drive folder in a new tab.
If the client doesn't have a folder yet: right-click in an empty area → New Folder → name it the client's first and last name (example: Justin Adams) → open it.
5
Open your computer's Downloads folder, find the .ipsquote file you just saved, and drag it into the client's Drive folder. This is now the official saved record of this quote.
6
Click the blue 📧 Send to Client button.
A preview pops up with the email already filled in. Double-check the email address and the price are correct, then click the green ✅ Confirm & Send button. The quote is sent!
7
Sales Order mode works almost the exact same way — click Convert to Sales Order at the top first (this builds the order confirmation automatically), then Save and Send just like a normal quote.
The only difference: instead of a pricing table in the email, the preview will show that an official PDF Sales Order is attached. Everything else is identical.
PART 2 — REVISING OR REOPENING AN OLD QUOTE
1
Click 📂 Load Saved Quote.
2
In the window that opens, find the client's .ipsquote file. If it's a recent quote, check your Downloads folder. If it's an older one, go to their folder in Google Drive (the same 2026 folder from Part 1).
3
Select the file — every field reloads exactly as it was.
4
Make whatever changes the client needs. Then click Save Quote File again — this updates the same client's record in the Tracker (it will not create a duplicate) and saves a new backup file.
5
If they're ready to book, switch to Sales Order mode first, then Save and Send as a Sales Order — this marks them as Booked in the Tracker automatically.
💡 Tip: If Google Drive is set up on your computer (ask Andrew or Brent if you're not sure), it will show up as its own folder right next to Downloads when the Load window opens — no need to search through old downloads.
PART 3 — USING THE QUOTE TRACKER
The Quote Tracker is a separate page (link in the same place you opened this Generator) that shows every quote and sales order — these are our hot leads, and the goal is closing every one of them.
1
Every quote you Save in the Generator shows up here automatically — nothing to add manually.
2
Sending a follow-up:
Click Send FU1 (blue) for the first follow-up, usually 2–3 days after the quote was sent. Click Send FU2 (gold) for the second follow-up, usually 5–6 days after, right before the quote expires. A preview pops up fully written — just check the email address, then click ✅ Confirm & Send.
3
Custom email: Click the Custom button to write a one-off message instead of using a follow-up template.
4
Notes: Click Notes on any quote to add details — anything you want Andrew or Brent to know about that client.
5
As you send follow-ups, the Stage updates on its own — Quote Sent → Follow-Up 1 Sent → Follow-Up 2 Sent — so we always know where every lead stands. This also keeps the KPI numbers at the top accurate.
6
Adding a quote that didn't go through the Generator (an offsite quote, or a backdated one): click the gold + Add Quote Manually button, fill in the client's info, and click the green Add to Tracker button.
DEVICE SETUP — ONE TIME PER COMPUTER
1
Go to ips-quote-system.vercel.app and bookmark it.
2
The first time you use it, click Sign in with Google at the top and sign in with the instapartyspot@gmail.com account. After that, you'll stay signed in — no need to do this again on this device.
Subject:Price Quote – Insta Party Spot San Dimas – [Client] – Event Date: TBD – 5:00 PM–10:00 PM
Hi [Client], I'm glad you were able to come to our "Spot" and meet with us! Per your request, please see the discounted price quote listed below for your upcoming Birthday Party. Event Details: • Name: [Client] • Date: — • Venue: Insta Party Spot San Dimas — 402 W. Arrow Hwy #5, San Dimas, CA 91773 • Session: 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM • Guests: — [PASTE QUOTE TABLE HERE] Please review this price quote and let us know if we need to make any changes, or if this is good to go! ⏰ This quote is valid until Sunday, June 28, 2026. Pricing and availability are subject to change — secure your date with a deposit to lock everything in. In order to confirm and hold this date and make this reservation official, the deposit is $200, paid by cash, credit card (+3%), or Zelle. If you wish to pay via Zelle, let us know and we'll provide our Zelle details. The final balance is not due until 1 week before the actual event. Please let us know any questions you have. We look forward to making this a very special event!
